headline: Market Volatility Declines Sharply After Nasdaq Jumps More Than 300 Points
summary:
U.S. stocks rose sharply on Wednesday, with Treasury yields climbing to two-week highs on Wednesday following better-than-expected economic data and strong projections from some major companies.

All the three major indices settled higher, with Nasdaq settling at a three-month high level on Wednesday.

headline: Moderna, PayPal And Some Other Big Gainers From Wednesday
summary: U.S. stocks closed higher on Wednesday, with the Dow Jones gaining more than 400 points. Here is the list of some big stocks moving higher in the previous session.

headline: Elon Musk's Starlink Pricing Reportedly Slashed By 50% In France — But There's A Catch
summary: SpaceX’s Starlink high-speed satellite internet connection is now available at a bargain, Tesla North reported, citing emails from the company sent to users shared on a Reddit thread.

headline: Twitter Subpoenas Binance In Legal Fight Over Elon Musk's $44B Deal
summary: Twitter Inc (NYSE: TWTR) has reportedly subpoenaed cryptocurrency exchange Binance over its role as a would-be lender to Elon Musk’s $44 billion takeover bid.

headline: Alibaba Surges Over 5% Ahead Of Earnings As Hang Seng Tracks Wall Street Higher
summary: Hong Kong’s benchmark Hang Seng Index rose over 2% in opening trade on Thursday, following an upbeat session on Wall Street overnight.

headline: Top Wall Street Bets Mentions For Wednesday August 3, 2022 After-Hours: GME, LCID, MSM, TSLA, AMC, AMD, AAPL, MELI, HOOD, BABA
